description: Add status lifecycle, vendor response mechanism, upvote system, and notification system. This is the core functional expansion: custom post statuses (Pending, In Progress, Fulfilled), vendor response meta/display, upvote AJAX endpoint, and email notifications to submitters on approval/vendor response.
steps: Create new file zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-status.php: Register custom post statuses 'zcrb_in_progress' and 'zcrb_fulfilled' (using register_post_status). Add status transition hooks. Provide a status label helper. Pending uses WP built-in 'pending', Published means 'Approved/Live'. Add 'In Progress' (vendor is working on it) and 'Fulfilled' (request completed). Add status dropdown to the admin edit screen. Add status badge CSS classes.

Create new file zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-vendor-response.php: Add a meta box on the single request edit screen for vendor responses. Store responses as post meta '_zcrb_vendor_responses' (serialized array of {vendor_id, vendor_name, message, timestamp}). Provide a public render method that shows responses on the single-post frontend view. Only users with 'edit_others_posts' capability (vendors/admins) can add responses. Add an AJAX endpoint for vendor response submission from the frontend single-post view (if user has capability).

Create new file zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-upvote.php: Add upvote functionality using post meta '_zcrb_upvote_count' (int) and '_zcrb_upvoted_users' (serialized array of user IDs). Add AJAX endpoint 'zcrb_upvote' for logged-in users to upvote (toggle). Each user can upvote once per request. Display upvote count on cards and single view. Add a heart/thumbs-up icon button.

Create new file zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-notify.php: Send email notification to the submitter when their request is approved (status changes to publish). Send email when a vendor responds. Use the submitter's stored _zcrb_email. Respect a new setting 'notify_submitter_on_approve' (default 1) and 'notify_submitter_on_response' (default 1). Hook into post status transitions and the vendor response action.

Update zymarg-community-board/zymarg-community-board.php: Add require_once for the 4 new class files. Instantiate them in the plugins_loaded callback. Register new post meta for upvotes and vendor responses in class-zcrb-cpt.php.

Update zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-settings.php: Add new settings 'notify_submitter_on_approve' and 'notify_submitter_on_response' (both default 1) to defaults(). Add checkboxes in the Notifications section of the settings page. Add sanitization for the new boolean settings.

Update zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-template.php: In render_card(), add upvote count display and status badge. In render_single(), add vendor responses section and upvote button. Add the vendor response form for authorized users on single view.
Update zymarg-community-board/assets/js/zcrb.js: Add upvote toggle handler (AJAX POST to admin-ajax.php with action zcrb_upvote). Add vendor response form submission handler. Localize new nonces.

Update zymarg-community-board/assets/css/zcrb.css: Add styles for status badges (.zcrb-status-badge with variants for each status), upvote button (.zcrb-upvote), vendor response section (.zcrb-responses), and the vendor response form.
Update the wp_localize_script call in zymarg-community-board/zymarg-community-board.php to include the new nonce for upvote and vendor response AJAX actions.
acceptance_criteria: Custom post statuses zcrb_in_progress and zcrb_fulfilled are registered
Vendor responses can be stored and displayed on single request view
Upvote system works via AJAX with user-unique constraint
Email notifications fire on approval and vendor response
New settings appear in the Notifications section
All new i18n strings have both en and bn translations
All PHP files pass syntax check
findings: All 11 steps completed. Created 4 new class files (ZCRB_Status, ZCRB_Vendor_Response, ZCRB_Upvote, ZCRB_Notify). Updated bootstrap, settings, template, i18n (en+bn), CSS, JS, and CPT. Also added admin brand color CSS to the ZCRB_Admin class so the WordPress sidebar 'Community Board' menu text displays in the ZYMARG brand color (#9500A5). All PHP files pass syntax check (php -l).
